display.purpose: Hero name only — the single large type moment.

shadows.name: rest
shadows.purpose: Barely-there resting shadow; the border does the separating.

shadows.name: active
shadows.purpose: Hover/focus feedback on interactive cards, paired with scale(1.02).

motion.name: transition-colors
motion.purpose: Default for color/opacity state changes on links and buttons.

motion.name: spring-entrance
motion.purpose: Hero avatar/heading entrances; needs prefers-reduced-motion fallback.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one loud action — hero CTA (e.g. Download CV). Ice fill, navy text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #ADD8E6; color: #000080; padding: 0.625rem 1.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(173,216,230,0.8); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #000080; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Outline companion action over imagery (e.g. Contact Me). Snow border, snow text.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #FFFAFA; padding: 0.625rem 1.5rem; border: 2px solid #FFFAFA; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255,250,250,0.1); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FFFAFA; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Contact Pill
components.description: Contact channel link with leading icon — ice-wash background, navy text.
components.html: Email
components.css: .ds-contact-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: rgba(173,216,230,0.2); color: #000080; border: 1px solid rgba(173,216,230,0.3); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-contact-pill:hover { background: rgba(173,216,230,0.4); } .ds-contact-pill:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #000080; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Flat-at-rest content surface (project, skill, cert). Full steel border; lifts on hover.
components.html:
Project Title

A short description of the work, kept to a calm, legible measure.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid rgba(109,129,150,0.3); border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 1.5rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: box-shadow 0.3s, transform 0.3s; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-card-title { color: #000080; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.125rem; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-card-body { color: rgba(0,0,128,0.7); font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.625; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; margin: 0; }

components.name: Tag Pill
components.description: Static skill/tech label. Pill shape, ice-wash, navy text.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.75rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(173,216,230,0.2); color: #000080; border: 1px solid rgba(173,216,230,0.3); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Navbar Link
components.description: Top-bar nav link — muted at rest, brightens to full navy on hover.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { color: rgba(0,0,128,0.7); font-size: 0.875rem; text-decoration: none; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #000080; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #000080; outline-offset: 4px; border-radius: 2px; }

narrative.overview: This is the interface of someone who watches systems at night and keeps them safe. The aesthetic borrows from a calm SOC/NOC: a deep navy field, clean snow-white reading surfaces, steel-gray structure, and a single ice-blue signal color that lights up only where something matters. Nothing shouts. Credibility is conveyed by exactness — correct alignment, honest contrast, surfaces that respond precisely to interaction — because the persona is a security and infrastructure engineer, and the build itself is the work sample. The system runs in two coordinated themes: snow-light for daytime reading and midnight-navy-dark for the operations-deck mode, both holding WCAG AA contrast.
keyCharacteristics: One cool signal color (ice) used sparingly for meaning, not decoration.
Flat surfaces at rest; depth appears only as a response to interaction.
Single typeface (Inter) worked across weights — no decorative pairing.
Substance-first: every motion and accent earns its place.

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Ice is a signal, not a surface. It covers ≤15% of any screen and appears only where it means something — an action, a link, an active state, a credential. Its rarity is what makes it read as important.

rules.name: The Cool-Spine Rule
rules.body: Every neutral leans cool (toward navy/steel), never warm. No cream, sand, or beige ever enters this palette.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Inter only. Express hierarchy through weight and size, never by introducing a second typeface.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Section titles stand alone. No tiny uppercase tracked kicker and no 01/02/03 numbered markers as default scaffolding.

rules.name: The Respond-Don't-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadow and lift exist only as feedback to hover, focus, or elevation change.

dos: Do keep every neutral cool (navy/steel/snow). Warmth is forbidden in this system.
Do reserve ice for signals — actions, links, active states, credentials — at ≤15% coverage.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest and let shadow/scale appear only on hover/focus.
Do use one typeface (Inter) across weights; express hierarchy by weight and size.
Do verify body text hits ≥4.5:1 in both themes — especially steel metadata on snow, and snow/70 body on midnight.
Do give every framer-motion entrance and scroll-reveal a prefers-reduced-motion fallback, with content visible by default.
Do use full 1px steel borders to separate surfaces.
donts: Don't ship the untouched create-next-app / generic-template look, or the corporate-bland stock-enterprise look.
Don't introduce cream, sand, beige, or any warm-tinted neutral.
Don't use purple-to-blue gradients, gradient text, or glassmorphism as decoration.
Don't build identical icon+heading+text card grids that repeat endlessly, or the big-number hero-metric template.
Don't add tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows or 01/02/03 numbered markers above every section.
Don't use border-left/border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't nest a card inside another card.
Don't let steel gray drop below 4.5:1 for any real body text.
